parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', p.id,
  'project_name', p.name,
  'project_type', p.project_type,
  'property_area_m2', p.property_area_m2,
  'location_city', p.location_city,
  'cost_estimate_id', ce.id,
  'version', ce.version,
  'total_estimated', ce.total_estimated,
  'budget_target', ce.budget_target,
  'breakdown', ce.breakdown,
  'status', ce.status
) AS data
FROM projects p
JOIN cost_estimates ce ON ce.project_id = p.id
WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
  AND ($2::int IS NULL OR ce.version = $2::int)
ORDER BY ce.version DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: item, binary: { data: { data: Buffer.from(item.content, 'utf8').toString('base64'), mimeType: 'text/plain', fileName: item.filename } } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'exported', filename: $('Build BC3').first().json.filename, bytes: $('Build BC3').first().json.bytes, partidas_count: $('Build BC3').first().json.partidas_count, drive_file_id: ($('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.id || null), drive_url: ($('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.webViewLink || null)}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({status:'not_found', error:'No hay cost_estimate para ese project_id'}) }}
